name: Reproducible Run Capture
summary: Capture command, environment, provenance, and logs for reproducible HPC runs.
description: This skill wraps a user command with metadata capture so support teams and collaborators can see command arguments, working directory, modules, environment, git state, optional input checksums, stdout, stderr, and exit code.

inputs.name: command
inputs.description: Command and arguments to run while capturing reproducibility metadata.

inputs.name: input_manifest
inputs.description: Optional newline-delimited list of input files to checksum.

outputs.name: run_capture_directory
outputs.description: Directory containing command, environment, provenance, stdout, stderr, input checksums, and exit code.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run the wrapper around a short command and confirm metadata, stdout, stderr, and exit-code files are written.
